# services.rkvm

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.rkvm`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.rkvm.client.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the rkvm client daemon (input receiver). |
| `services.rkvm.client.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Structured client daemon configuration |
| `services.rkvm.client.settings.certificate` | `absolute path` | TLS ceritficate path. ::: {.note} This should be generated with {command}`rkvm-certificate-gen`. ::: |
| `services.rkvm.client.settings.password` | `string` | Shared secret token to authenticate the client. Make sure this matches your server's config. |
| `services.rkvm.client.settings.server` | `string` | An RKVM server's internet socket address, either IPv4 or IPv6. |
| `services.rkvm.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rkvm, a Virtual KVM switch for Linux machines. |
| `services.rkvm.package` | `package` | The rkvm package to use. |
| `services.rkvm.server.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the rkvm server daemon (input transmitter). |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Structured server daemon configuration |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings.certificate` | `absolute path` | TLS certificate path. ::: {.note} This should be generated with {command}`rkvm-certificate-gen`. ::: |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings.key` | `absolute path` | TLS key path. ::: {.note} This should be generated with {command}`rkvm-certificate-gen`. ::: |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings.listen` | `string` | An internet socket address to listen on, either IPv4 or IPv6. |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings.password` | `string` | Shared secret token to authenticate the client. Make sure this matches your client's config. |
| `services.rkvm.server.settings.switch-keys` | `list of string` | A key list specifying a host switch combination. _A list of key names is available in <https://github.com/htrefil/rkvm/blob/master/switch-keys.md>._ |
